name: ledgermint
description: B2B SaaS that automates monthly close for US-based mid-market controllers; charges per-seat with a per-transaction overage tier.

name: vitalcue
description: Consumer healthtech app for chronic-illness patients in Germany and France; sells a monthly subscription bundling symptom tracking with on-demand telehealth.

name: gridspring
description: Hardware-with-service play: rents grid-edge battery packs to small US commercial buildings to shave demand charges, with a 5-year service contract.

name: kakikaki
description: B2C marketplace connecting Tokyo and Seoul beauty influencers with their fans for paid 1:1 video consults; takes a 20% transaction fee.

name: kappa-cli
description: Developer-focused B2B SaaS that ships a CLI plus a hosted control plane for managing ephemeral preview environments across cloud providers.

name: yume-tutor
description: Consumer edtech app for K-12 students in Indonesia and the Philippines; combines AI tutoring with weekly small-group sessions on a tiered freemium model.

name: helixthread
description: B2B biotech SaaS that licenses a wet-lab assay-management platform to academic spinouts and small CROs.

name: smolpark
description: Ad-supported B2C social app where users post 30-second voice notes from a single recurring location; viral in college towers.

name: lastmile-iq
description: B2B logistics SaaS that gives US regional 3PLs a route-optimizer plus a dispatcher cockpit; per-driver subscription with usage overages.

name: shardbright
description: B2C gaming studio shipping a free-to-play 4X strategy title across iOS, Android and Steam, monetized through cosmetics and a battle pass.
